name: Olive Garden Eggplant Parmigiana
recipeInstructions:
1. Moisten eggplant and coat lightly in flour.
2. Quickly brown slices in hot oil, dusting each side generously with seasoned salt.
3. When fork tender and golden brown, transfer to a jelly roll pan.
4. Cover loosely with foil and bake at 375°F about 20 to 25 minutes or until tender. Use 8 slices for this amount of sauce.
5. Combine sauce, jelly, and tomatoes that have been broken up with a fork. Heat on medium until piping hot. Do not boil. Be sure jelly is melted.
6. Arrange 2 slices of eggplant on each of 4 plates. Cover each with 1 slice of mozzarella.
7. Ladle sauce over all, not to cover completely. Place plates in the oven just to melt cheese and serve promptly.
